# Chapter 6: Healthcare systems  (~100 pp)
- 6.1 Healthcare as engineered system (15) · 6.2 Hospital design and operation (15) · 6.3 Medical-device infrastructure revisited from VI (12) · 6.4 Public-health engineering (15) · 6.5 Pandemic engineering: surveillance, response, manufacturing (15) · 6.6 Healthcare equity engineering-first (15) · 6.7 Failure section: healthcare-system failures (Walter Reed, Mid Staffordshire, COVID-19 logistics) (13)

**Archetype**: control, scaling, ethics. **Project**: assess one healthcare system's resilience using primary data. **Exercises**: 20.
